name: S-2 medium-fragility-tier prompt-on-change strategy reports structure delta percentage when above 5% per the architecture threshold
command: mkdir -p cache && for i in $(seq 1 100); do echo "line $i"; done > cache/x.html && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\nfor i in $(seq 1 200); do echo "line $i"; done\n' > up.sh && chmod +x up.sh && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/fetcher.sh" --source-id x --fragility-tier medium --strategy prompt-on-change --upstream-stub ./up.sh --cache cache --no-confirm-default 2>err.txt && grep -q 'structure delta' err.txt && grep -q 'threshold 5%' err.txt && echo prompted 1>&2
